fountain.description: A clear fountain bubbles softly at the room's heart, its water faintly luminous. A passage lies beyond.
fountain.drink_text: You cup the cool water and drink deep. Warmth spreads through your limbs.

search_find.description: An old storeroom, cluttered with broken furniture and rotted crates. A passage leads onward.
search_find.search_result: Behind a toppled cabinet you turn up something worth keeping!

red_herring.description: A bare, silent room. Nothing but dust and a passage leading straight on.
red_herring.search_result: You comb every corner and shadow... nothing here but wasted time... you open the door and step into the next room, disappointed.
